name: 5 Whys
description: Ask why 5 times to reach root cause

name: Fishbone Diagram
description: Categorize causes: people, process, technology, environment

name: Systems Thinking
description: Map feedback loops and leverage points

name: First Principles
description: Break down to fundamental truths, reason up

name: Lateral Thinking
description: Challenge assumptions using provocation and random entry

name: Kepner-Tregoe Analysis
description: Systematic situation appraisal, problem analysis, decision analysis

name: Reframing
description: Restate the problem from a different viewpoint or stakeholder

name: Pre-Mortem
description: Imagine the project failed, then identify what went wrong

name: Pareto Analysis
description: Identify the 20% of causes producing 80% of effects

name: Morphological Analysis
description: Decompose problem into dimensions, combine solutions systematically
